name: Pear Granola Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Core and slice 1/2 pear; reserve.
2. Grate remaining pears to make 1 cup.
3. Cream butter with brown sugar until smooth.
4. Add eggs, beating well. Stir in the grated pears.
5. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda.
6. Alternately add these dry ingredients with buttermilk and lemon peel to the butter mixture, stirring after each addition.
7. Fold in granola and raisins until combined.
8. Pour batter into a greased and floured 9x5x3-inch pan.
9. Top with reserved pear slices.
10. Sprinkle Crunch Topping over the batter.
11. Bake at 350°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
12. Cool for 10 minutes before removing from the pan.
Makes 1 loaf.
